Geneformer|Norman.rationale: Genecorpus-30M excludes cell lines; Norman uses K562 cell line

Geneformer|Replogle.rationale: Genecorpus-30M excludes cell lines; Replogle uses K562/RPE1

Geneformer|CITE-seq.rationale: Independent corpus (pre-Census); bone marrow may be included but not ADT data

Geneformer|Weinreb.rationale: Genecorpus-30M is human-only; Weinreb is mouse HSPCs

Geneformer|sci-fate.rationale: A549 cell line excluded from Genecorpus

scGPT|Norman.rationale: Census excludes cell culture and perturbation assays

scGPT|Replogle.rationale: Census excludes cell culture and perturbation assays

scGPT|CITE-seq.rationale: GSE194122 present in Census 2023-05-15; RNA portion may overlap

scGPT|Weinreb.rationale: In vitro culture excluded from Census inclusion criteria

scGPT|sci-fate.rationale: A549 cell line excluded from Census

UCE|CITE-seq.rationale: Census-derived training data; GSE194122 likely included

TranscriptFormer|Norman.rationale: Virtual Cells corpus excludes cell culture

TranscriptFormer|Replogle.rationale: Virtual Cells corpus excludes perturbation assays

TranscriptFormer|CITE-seq.rationale: CZI builds both Census and TranscriptFormer; high overlap likelihood

Arc State ST|Replogle.rationale: Replogle K562 explicitly in Arc State ST training data list

Arc State ST|Norman.rationale: Not listed in Arc State ST training data

Arc State ST|CITE-seq.rationale: ST model does not evaluate on Dim D (cross-modal)

Arc State ST|Weinreb.rationale: ST model does not evaluate on Dim E (temporal)

Arc State ST|sci-fate.rationale: ST model does not evaluate on Dim E (temporal)
